container.\n builder.Services.AddControllersWithViews();\n+\n+var labUsers = BuildLab1Users();\n+builder.Services.AddSingleton(labUsers);\n \n var app = builder.Build();\n@@\n app.MapControllerRoute(\n     name: \"default\",\n     pattern: \"{controller=Home}/{action=Index}/{id?}\")\n     .WithStaticAssets();\n \n \n app.Run();\n+\n+List<UserProfile> BuildLab1Users()\n+{\n+    var techStore = new Merchant\n+    {\n+        Name = \"Tech Basket\",\n+        Category = \"Electronics\",\n+        CountryCode = \"HR\",\n+        IsOnlineOnly = true,\n+ \"SI\",\n+        IsOnlineOnly = true,\n+        AverageDeliveryDays = 5\n+    };\n+\n+    var stressTag = new Tag { Name = \"Stress Buy\", ColorHex = \"#D9534F\", Description = \"Kupnja pod stresom\" \"#5BC0DE\", Description = \"Kupnja nakon sadr++aja s dru+ítvenih mre++a\" };\n+\n+    var user1 = new UserProfile\n+    {\n+        FirstName = \"Luka\",\n+        LastName = \"Kova-ě\",\n+ {"timestamp":"2026-03-27T14:49:35.542Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\lo14l\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\0e9afe2723d4389671589f5b36908849\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f.jsonl","prompt":"ok napravi mi sad i onaj dio s LINQ upitima iz md filea","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-27T14:49:40.340Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\lo14l\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\0e9afe2723d4389671589f5b36908849\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f.jsonl","tool_name":"read_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker\\impulse-spending-tracker\\Program.cs","startLine":1,"endLine":420},"tool_use_id":"call_adhkbsTkHhHWW0pgfB9I3lWm__vscode-1774622023912","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}

{"timestamp":"2026-03-27T14:49:58.353Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\lo14l\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\0e9afe2723d4389671589f5b36908849\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\c6afc399-ba3c-4904-8b65-78a3e574ce9f.jsonl","tool_name":"apply_patch","tool_input":{"explanation":"Add Lab 1 LINQ query examples over seeded object graph and print results via app logger.","input":"*** Begin Patch\n*** Update File: d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker\\impulse-spending-tracker\\Program.cs\n@@\n var app = builder.Build();\n+\n+RunLab1LinqQueries(labUsers, app.Logger);\n@@\n app.Run();\n+\n+void RunLab1LinqQueries(List<UserProfile> users, ILogger logger)\n+{\n+    var allPurchases = users\n+        .SelectMany(u => u.Purchases)\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var expensivePurchases = allPurchases\n+        .Where(p => p.Amount >= 180m)\n+        .OrderByDescending(p => p.Amount)\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var stressTriggeredPurchases = allPurchases\n+        .Where(p => p.TriggerType == ImpulseTriggerType.Stress || p.Tags.Any(t => t.Name == \"Stress Buy\"))\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var topPurchase = allPurchases\n+        .OrderByDescending(p => p.Amount)\n+        .FirstOrDefault();\n+\n+    var singlePetra = users\n+        .SingleOrDefault(u => u.Email == \"petra.maric@example.com\");\n+\n+    var purchaseCountByUser = users\n+        .Select(u => new\n+        {\n+            User = $\"{u.FirstName} {u.LastName}\",\n+            PurchaseCount = u.Purchases.Count(),\n+            TotalSpent = u.Purchases.Sum(p => p.Amount)\n+        })\n+        .OrderByDescending(x => x.TotalSpent)\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var usersWithPurchaseAboveIncomeShare = users\n+        .Where(u => u.Purchases.Any(p => p.Amount > (u.MonthlyNetIncome * 0.10m)))\n+        .Select(u => $\"{u.FirstName} {u.LastName}\")\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var sessionToPurchaseProjection = users\n+        .SelectMany(u => u.Sessions.Select(s => new\n+        {\n+            User = $\"{u.FirstName} {u.LastName}\",\n+            SessionStart = s.StartedAt,\n+            PurchaseTitles = s.Purchases.Select(p => p.Title).ToList(),\n+            SessionSpent = s.SpentAmount\n+        }))\n+        .OrderByDescending(x => x.SessionSpent)\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    var purchasesByTrigger = allPurchases\n+        .GroupBy(p => p.TriggerType)\n+        .Select(g => new\n+        {\n+            Trigger = g.Key,\n+            Count = g.Count(),\n+            Sum = g.Sum(x => x.Amount)\n+        })\n+        .OrderByDescending(x => x.Count)\n+        .ThenByDescending(x => x.Sum)\n+        .ToList();\n+\n+    logger.LogInformation(\"=== LAB 1 LINQ QUERIES ===\");\n+    logger.LogInformation(\"Ukupno kupnji: {Count}\", allPurchases.Count());\n+    logger.LogInformation(\"Kupnje skuplje ili jednake 180 EUR: {Count}\", expensivePurchases.Count());\n+    logger.LogInformation(\"Kupnje s triggerom/tagom stress: {Count}\", stressTriggeredPurchases.Count());\n+\n+    if (topPurchase is not null)\n+    {\n+        logger.LogInformation(\n+            \"Najskuplja kupnja: {Title} ({Amount} {Currency})\",\n+            topPurchase.Title,\n+            topPurchase.Amount,\n+            topPurchase.Currency);\n+    }\n+\n+    logger.LogInformation(\n+        \"SingleOrDefault provjera za Petru: {Exists}\",\n+        singlePetra is not null ? \"pronadjena\" : \"nije pronadjena\");\n+\n+    foreach (var item in purchaseCountByUser)\n+    {\n+        logger.LogInformation(\n+            \"Korisnik {User} -> broj kupnji: {Count}, ukupno potroseno: {Spent}\",\n+            item.User,\n+            item.PurchaseCount,\n+            item.TotalSpent);\n+    }\n+\n+    logger.LogInformation(\n+        \"Korisnici s barem jednom kupnjom > 10% mjesecnog prihoda: {Users}\",\n+        usersWithPurchaseAboveIncomeShare.Count > 0 ? string.Join(\", \", usersWithPurchaseAboveIncomeShare) : \"nema\");\n+\n+    foreach (var session in sessionToPurchaseProjection)\n+    {\n+        logger.LogInformation(\n+            \"Session {User} ({Start}) -> potroseno {Spent}, kupljeno: {Titles}\",\n+            session.User,\n+            session.SessionStart,\n+            session.SessionSpent,\n+            session.PurchaseTitles.Count > 0 ? string.Join(\", \", session.PurchaseTitles) : \"nista\");\n+    }\n+\n+    foreach (var trigger in purchasesByTrigger)\n+    {\n+        logger.LogInformation(\n+            \"Trigger {Trigger} -> broj: {Count}, iznos: {Sum}\",\n+            trigger.Trigger,\n+            trigger.Count,\n+            trigger.Sum);\n+    }\n+}\n \n List<UserProfile> BuildLab1Users()\n {\n*** End Patch"},"tool_use_id":"call_UAeZxXjjQP3ejiLmOhrgGMT3__vscode-1774622023913","cwd":"d:\\dev\\impulse-spending-tracker"}
